description: Configure Firefox to forcefully override all website fonts and colors to create an accessible reading environment. Go to Settings > General > Language and Appearance. Configure the following: 1) Set the Default font to 'Verdana'. 2) Set the Size to '24'. 3) Disable the checkbox that allows pages to choose their own fonts (force your font). 4) Open the Colors menu. Set Text to Black (#000000) and Background to Light Yellow (#FFFFE0). 5) Set 'Override the colors specified by the page with your selections' to 'Always'. Close the browser when finished to save your settings.
